mapper.select: SELECT fav_id, employee_no, target_type, target_id, label, url, icon, sort_order, created_at FROM platform_v3.ux_favorite WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} ORDER BY sort_order, fav_id
SELECT fav_id, employee_no, target_type, target_id, label, url, icon, sort_order, created_at FROM platform_v3.ux_favorite WHERE fav_id = #{favId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.ux_favorite (employee_no, target_type, target_id, label, url, icon, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{label}, #{url}, #{icon}, COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (employee_no, target_type, target_id) DO UPDATE SET label = EXCLUDED.label, url = EXCLUDED.url, icon = EXCLUDED.icon
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM platform_v3.ux_favorite WHERE fav_id = #{favId} AND employee_no = #{employeeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT pref_id, employee_no, category, channel, enabled, updated_at FROM platform_v3.ux_notify_pref WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} ORDER BY category, channel
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.ux_notify_pref (employee_no, category, channel, enabled, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, #{category}, #{channel}, #{enabled}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (employee_no, category, channel) DO UPDATE SET enabled = EXCLUDED.enabled, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.board_type, p.dept_id, d.dept_name, p.title, p.created_by, p.view_count, p.created_at FROM platform_v3.bd_post p LEFT JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON p.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND (p.title ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.content ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT DISTINCT d.doc_id, d.doc_title, d.form_code, d.drafter_no, d.drafter_name, d.status, d.created_at FROM platform_v3.ap_document d WHERE d.doc_title ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND ( d.drafter_no = #{userNo} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM platform_v3.ap_approval_line l WHERE l.doc_id = d.doc_id AND l.approver_no = #{userNo} ) ) ORDER BY d.created_at DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_no, e.employee_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, e.position_id, p.position_name, e.email, e.phone FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (e.employee_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR e.email ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.position_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY e.employee_name LIMIT 10

SELECT f.file_id, f.folder_id, f.file_name, f.size_bytes, f.mime_type, f.uploader_no, f.uploaded_at, f.download_count, fo.folder_name, fo.scope FROM platform_v3.dl_file f JOIN platform_v3.dl_folder fo ON f.folder_id = fo.folder_id WHERE f.file_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND ( fo.scope = 'COMPANY'
OR (fo.scope = 'DEPT' AND fo.owner_dept_id = #{deptId})
OR (fo.scope = 'PERSONAL' AND fo.owner_no = #{employeeNo})
) ORDER BY f.uploaded_at DESC LIMIT 10
